_note: Zapier MCP server template at .claude/templates/.mcp.json (placeholder token). Live token in settings.local.json (gitignored).

hooks.prompt: A git commit was just made. Run `git diff HEAD~1 HEAD` to see what changed, then review the code for: 1) Security issues — hardcoded credentials, injection risks, dangerous function calls. 2) Correctness — bugs, unhandled errors, missing validation. 3) Code quality — dead code, functions doing too much, confusing naming. Output: what looks good, issues with severity (CRITICAL/WARNING/MINOR), and a one-line verdict. Under 200 words. Be direct.
